signals.headline: US-Iran ceasefire extended (April 22, 2026)** | YES | HIGH confidence[3]
signals.raw:
US-Iran ceasefire extended (April 22, 2026)** | YES | HIGH confidence[3]

Goldman Sachs' U.S. Inflation Monitor (released April 20) highlights Iran war as primary driver of March 2026 headline CPI surge to 3.29% YoY (up 0.87% MoM) and PCE to 3.45% YoY, due to 45% oil spike to $103/barrel, though core inflation decelerates with forecasts for easing to 2.2% PCE by late 2026 amid fading tariffs[1][2]
